---
title: "PRISMA 2020 Flow Diagram"
format:
  docx: default
  html: default
---

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    subgraph Identification
        A["Records identified through<br/>database searching<br/>(n = )"]
        B["Additional records identified<br/>through other sources<br/>(n = )"]
    end

    subgraph Screening
        C["Records after duplicates removed<br/>(n = )"]
        D["Records screened<br/>(n = )"]
        E["Records excluded<br/>(n = )"]
        F["Full-text articles assessed<br/>for eligibility<br/>(n = )"]
        G["Full-text articles excluded,<br/>with reasons<br/>(n = )"]
    end

    subgraph Included
        H["Studies included in<br/>qualitative synthesis<br/>(n = )"]
        I["Studies included in<br/>quantitative synthesis<br/>(meta-analysis)<br/>(n = )"]
    end

    A --> C
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    D --> F
    F --> G
    F --> H
    H --> I
```

## Full-Text Exclusion Reasons

| Reason | n |
|--------|---|
| | |
| | |
| | |
| **Total excluded** | **0** |
